subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God, thou assured leaf! Verily thou hast been quickened by the life-bestowing breeze of the Abhá Kingdom, and in the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه حقا که از نسیم جانبخش ملکوت ابهی زنده شدی و در امر
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
